head.title: SilkPage
head.summary: An XML based Publishing Framework for Web
head.keywords: markup, web standards, W3C, XML, XSL, CSS, XHTML

webpage.para: SilkPage is an XML based Web publishing framework that has evolved from the Docbook Website. With strong foundations in XML, it is a publishing framework with a focus on web standards and usability. SilkPage provides a framework for publishing structured and standard compliant websites in XML. It is particularly suited to publish personal websites, though it is by no means limited to them. Learn more »

section.title: Top Three Reasons Not to Convert to SilkPage

listitem.para: You hate standard markup and valid code.
You don't like web pages that comply with accessibility and usability standards.
You enjoy creating multiple versions of every HTML page of your website for every conceivable browser, operating system and device.
SilkPage is developed with accessibility and usability in mind.
Integrated XML, RSS and RDF feed generation.
Customization via XSL and CSS customization layers.
